igbo.explore_drag_the_protractor_name_the_a: Nyochaa — dọrọ protractor, nye akụkụ aha
igbo.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Nkọ < 90°, ziri ezi = 90°, obosara 90–180°, kwụ ọtọ = 180°, reflex > 180°. E kere protractor ihe dị ka 1801; ọdịdị ọkapa ọkụ ya ka a na-eji n'ụlọ akwụkwọ geometry ọ bụla.
igbo.challenges_estimate_classify_measure: Ihe ịma aka — mee atụmatụ, kewaa, tụọ
igbo.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Atụmatụ na-ewuli echiche oghere; ọtụtụ ziri ezi na-ewuli omume protractor. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: were akụkụ dị ka akụkụ nke ntụgharị zuru ezu (1/360 nke ntụgharị otu).
igbo.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Akụkụ complementary na-agbakọ ruo 90°; supplementary 180°; akụkụ vertical hà nhata; akụkụ alternate interior na-adaba ma ọ bụrụ na ahịrị abụọ dị n'otu ahịrị. Eziokwu anọ ndị a na-emeghe ọtụtụ ihe ngosipụta sekọndrị.
igbo.tools_bisector_second_ray_calculator: Ngwaọrụ — bisector, ray nke abụọ, kalkuleta
igbo.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Bisection = ịkewa ọkapa abụọ (iwu ya na kọmpass + straightedge dị na Euclid Elements, Akwụkwọ nke I, Ntụaka 9). Ngwaọrụ ọgbara ọhụrụ: protractor, ihe ntụ akụkụ, theodolite — otu echiche, e mezigharịrị.
igbo.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips: Pịa iji nweta ndụmọdụ akụkụ ahaziri onwe!
igbo.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Pịa iji nweta ndụmọdụ akụkụ ahaziri onwe!
igbo.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Lee akụkụ na protractor (ezoro ọnụọgụgụ). Ogbe ole?
igbo.opposite_angles_formed_by_intersecting: Akụkụ ndị na-emegide nke ahịrị na-agafe agafe na-emepụta; mgbe niile hà nhata
igbo.no_angles_explored_yet: Enweghị akụkụ enyochara ka ugbu a
igbo.two_rays_overlap_exactly_no_rotation: Ray abụọ na-ekpuchi onwe ha kpọmkwem. Ọ dịghị ntụgharị.
igbo.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Obere karịa akụkụ ziri ezi. Iberibe pizza, «obere karịa nkuku square».
igbo.between_right_and_straight_wider_than_: N'etiti ziri ezi na kwụ ọtọ. Obosara karịa nkuku square.
igbo.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Ọkapa ntụgharị. Ray abụọ na-emepụta ahịrị kwụ ọtọ.
igbo.greater_than_a_straight_angle_measure_: Buru ibu karịa akụkụ kwụ ọtọ. Tụọ akụkụ n'akụkụ «mpụga».
igbo.complete_turn_the_two_rays_overlap_exa: Ntụgharị zuru ezu. Ray abụọ na-ekpuchi onwe ha kpọmkwem (dị ka 0°, mana gbara otu okirikiri zuru ezu).
igbo.history_careers: Akụkọ ihe mere eme na ọrụ
igbo.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Nchikota akụkụ ime = (n − 2) × 180° maka n-gon ọ bụla. Akụkụ mpụga ọ bụla nke polygon oge niile = 360°/n. Nchikota akụkụ mpụga mgbe niile = 360°.
igbo.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: sine = na ncherita/hypotenuse, cosine = nso/hypotenuse, tangent = na ncherita/nso. Ọrụ trigonometry na-enye ratio nke akụkụ right triangle; a gbasaara ya na akụkụ niile site na unit circle.
igbo.these_angles_their_trig_values_are_wor: Akụkụ ndị a + uru trig ha kwesịrị icheta — ha na-apụta mgbe niile na mgbakọ, physics, na injinia.
igbo.1_rad_180_57_296_1_180_0_01745_rad_1_g: 1 rad = 180/π ≈ 57.296°. 1° = π/180 ≈ 0.01745 rad. 1 gradian = 0.9°. Ọtụtụ kalkuleta nwere igodo ọnọdụ ogbe/radian — jide n'aka na ị nọ n'ọnọdụ ziri ezi!
igbo.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: A na-atụ bearing dị ka elekere site n'ugwu. Kọmpass nkịtị isi 16 nwere 22.5° n'etiti bearing nso.
igbo.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Nlele atọ nke otu ọnọdụ trigonometry. Dọrọ slider akụkụ (ma ọ bụ ịdị elu ụlọ elu) — nnọchi atọ na-emelite n'otu oge. Mgbe ahụ nwaa ule nsogbu ntụgharị: dozie uru mara mma site na otu nnọchi naanị.
igbo.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Gbanwee akụkụ ma lee atọ niile na-emelite ọnụ — «otu nlele, nnọchi atọ» pụtara nke a.
igbo.pisa_is_roughly_56_m_tall_leaning_4_to: (Ụlọ elu Pisa dị ihe dị ka 56 m ịdị elu, na-adaba ≈ 4° taa)
igbo.each_quiz_gives_you_partial_info_use_t: Ule ọ bụla na-enye gị ozi akụkụ. Jiri mmekọrịta e gosipụtara n'elu iji gbakọọ uru furu efu.
igbo.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Ndụmọdụ: hazigharịa tan(θ) = na ncherita/nso — ọ bụrụ na ị mara θ na otu akụkụ, ị nwere ike ịchọta nke ọzọ. Ọ bụrụ na ị mara akụkụ abụọ, were arctangent.
igbo.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Ọnụọgụgụ nwere ma ịba ụba ma ntụzịaka. A na-ese ya dị ka àkụ. Ọmụmaatụ: velocity, ike, displacement.
igbo.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Scalar = ọnụọgụgụ naanị (mass, okpomọkụ, oge). Vector = ịba ụba + ntụzịaka.
igbo.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Tinye ọdụ nke abụọ n'isi nke mbụ. Nchikota = site n'ọdụ nke mbụ ruo isi nke abụọ.
igbo.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Tinye ọdụ ọnụ. Diagonal nke parallelogram = nchikota.
igbo.vector_v_at_angle_v_v_cos_v_y_v_sin: Vector v na akụkụ θ: vₓ = v·cos θ, v_y = v·sin θ.
igbo.v_v_v_y_v_z_pythagoras_in_any_dimensio: |v| = √(vₓ² + v_y² + v_z²). Pythagoras na akụkụ ọ bụla.
igbo.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Ịba ụba 1. v̂ = v / |v|. A na-akpọkarị «ntụzịaka» nke v.
igbo.a_b_a_b_cos_gives_scalar_zero_when_per: a·b = |a||b|cos θ. Na-enye scalar. Efu ma ọ bụrụ perpendicular. Negative ma ọ bụrụ akụkụ > 90°.
igbo.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Na-enye vector perpendicular na abụọ ahụ. Ịba ụba = oghere parallelogram.
igbo.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Mpịakọta mkpịsị aka site na a ruo b. Isi mkpịsị aka na-atụ ntụzịaka nke a×b. (Coordinate aka nri.)
igbo.c_a_c_b_generates_a_plane_or_line_of_v: c₁·a + c₂·b. Na-emepụta plane (ma ọ bụ ahịrị) nke vector.
igbo.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Iwu nke abụọ nke Newton: F = ma. Net force bụ nchikota vector nke ike niile.
igbo.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Ntụzịaka ụgbọ elu + vector ikuku → ground speed (nchikota vector).
igbo.equilateral_triangle_square_regular_he: Triangle akụkụ hà, square, hexagon oge niile. Naanị polygon oge niile nke nwere ike ịtịa plane naanị ha.
igbo.interior_angle_must_divide_360_triangl: Akụkụ ime aghaghị ịkewa 360° zuru ezu. Triangle 60° (×6), square 90° (×4), hexagon 120° (×3). Pentagon 108° adịghị ekewa 360° → enweghị ike ịtịa ya naanị ya.
igbo.8_in_total_combine_multiple_regular_po: Ngụkọta 8. Ha na-ejikọta ọtụtụ polygon oge niile; otu nhazi na vertex ọ bụla.
igbo.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Tiling na-enweghị oge — anaghị emegharị kpọmkwem. Symmetry ugboro 5. Ọ kpaliri nchọpụta quasicrystal.
igbo.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Maka oghere e nyere, tiling hexagonal na-ebelata gburugburu niile. Hales gosipụtara (1999). Ihe kpatara aṅụ ji eji hexagon.
igbo.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Mpaghara ọ bụla = isi kacha nso na otu «seed» point. Ọ na-apụta n'okike (ntụpọ agụ, mkpọka apịtị, nhazi cell).
igbo.on_a_hyperbolic_plane_regular_pentagon: Na plane hyperbolic, pentagon oge niile (na ọtụtụ ọdịdị ndị ọzọ) nwere ike ịtịa. Usoro «Circle Limit» nke M.C. Escher.
igbo.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Square nwere agba nke aghaghị idaba na ndị agbata obi na akụkụ. Ha nwere ike ịṅomi Turing machine → nsogbu tiling n'ozuzu enweghị ike ikpebi.
igbo.a_single_tile_that_aperiodically_tiles: Otu tile nke na-atịa plane na-enweghị oge (ọdịdị «okpu» na «mmụọ»). Nnukwu nchọpụta na nso nso a.
igbo.in_a_right_triangle_a_b_c_where_c_is_t: Na right triangle, a² + b² = c² ebe c bụ hypotenuse. Atọ integer (a, b, c) nke na-emeju ka a na-akpọ atọ Pythagoras. Atọ «mbụ» enweghị common factor.
igbo.for_positive_integers_m_n_with_no_comm: Maka integer positive m > n enweghị common factor na abụọ ha abụghị odd niile: a = m² − n², b = 2mn, c = m² + n². Nwaa m=2, n=1 → (3,4,5).
igbo.circle_has_most_area_for_a_perimeter: Okirikiri nwere oghere kacha ukwuu maka gburugburu e nyere
igbo.isoperimetric_inequality_4_a_p_equalit: Enweghị nhata isoperimetric: 4πA ≤ P². Nhata naanị maka okirikiri. Ihe kpatara ụfụfụ ncha + mbara ala ji bụrụ sphere.
igbo.sphere_has_most_volume_for_a_surface_a: Sphere nwere mkpọ kacha ukwuu maka oghere elu e nyere
igbo.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: Ụdị 3D nke elu. Ụfụfụ otu bụ sphere; ụfụfụ jikọtara na-ezukọ na 120°.
igbo.regular_hexagons_tile_most_efficiently: Hexagon oge niile na-atịa nke ọma karịa
igbo.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Echiche honeycomb (Hales gosipụtara 1999): n'ime nkewa niile nke plane, tiling hexagonal nwere nchikota ogologo akụkụ kacha nta maka oghere ọ bụla.
igbo.triangle_is_most_rigid_shape: Triangle bụ ọdịdị kachasị sie ike
igbo.cannot_be_deformed_without_changing_si: Enweghị ike imebi ya n'agbanyeghị ịgbanwe ogologo akụkụ. Ihe kpatara akwa mmiri + ọnụ ụlọ truss ji eji triangle.
igbo.square_tiles_fill_the_plane_with_no_ga: Square tiles na-ejupụta plane enweghị oghere. Rectangle + parallelogram kwa.
igbo.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Hexagonal packing nke okirikiri na-ejupụta ~90.7% nke plane (kacha mma nwere ike). Square packing ~78.5% naanị.
igbo.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP abụọ na-erute ~74% density (echiche Kepler, Hales gosipụtara 2014).
igbo.only_5_in_3d_tetrahedron_cube_octahedr: 5 naanị na 3D: tetrahedron, cube, octahedron, dodecahedron, icosahedron. (Plato tụlere.)
igbo.4_vertices_6_edges_4_faces_minimum_3d_: Vertices 4, edges 6, faces 4. Ọdịdị 3D kacha nta.
igbo.for_sphere_inscribed_in_cylinder_h_2r_: Maka sphere edere n'ime cylinder (h = 2r): V_sphere = 2/3 × V_cylinder. (Nsonaazụ Archimedes kacha hụ n'anya.)
igbo.16_vertices_32_edges_24_faces_8_cells_: Vertices 16, edges 32, faces 24, cells 8. Enwere ike mepee ya n'ime cube 8 (dị ka Salvador Dalí siri kwuo).
igbo.single_sided_surface_cut_down_middle_l: Elu otu akụkụ. Bee n'etiti → otu loop dị ogologo. Bee na 1/3 → loop abụọ jikọtara (otu Möbius).
igbo.closed_non_orientable_surface_inside_o: Elu emechiri nke enweghị ike iduzi. Ime = mpụga. Na 3D naanị site na ịgafe onwe.
igbo.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Curve nke obosara kwụ ọtọ (ọ bụghị okirikiri!). Osisi na-atụgharị nke ọma n'elu triangle Reuleaux na-atụgharị. Drill bits na-eji ya.
igbo.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Polygon abụọ dị n'otu ahịrị a tụgharịrị 360°/2n, jikọtara na triangle. Tetrahedron bụ antiprism kacha mfe.
igbo.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Nwere chirality — ọdịdị aka ekpe na aka nri. Otu n'ime chiral Archimedean solid abụọ (nke ọzọ snub dodecahedron).
igbo.equation_z_xy_straight_lines_lie_on_it: Nhata z = xy. Ahịrị kwụ ọtọ dina n'elu ya n'ime ezinụlọ 2. Eji na Pringles + ụfọdụ elu ụlọ.
igbo.gomboc_2006_is_first_known_mono_monost: «Gömböc» (2006) bụ ihe mbụ a maara nke mono-monostatic — otu nguzozi kwụsiri ike + otu nke na-adịghị. Dị ka ihe egwuregwu na-eguzo n'onwe ya.
igbo.cannot_tile_plane_alone_gaps_but_7_egg: Enweghị ike ịtịa plane naanị ya — oghere. Mana ọdịdị àkwá 7 na-emepụta nkpakọ hexagonal.
igbo.common_in_crystals_cube_nacl_octahedro: A na-ahụkarị na crystal: cube (NaCl), octahedron (daịmọnd, fluorite), dodecahedron (pyrite, garnet).
igbo.truncated_icosahedron_60_carbons_like_: Icosahedron a bọcha. Carbon 60. Dị ka nhazi bọọlụ. Achọpụtara 1985.
igbo.helical_10_5_base_pairs_per_turn_major: Helical, ~10.5 base pairs kwa ntụgharị. Groove ukwu + groove nta. Diameter kwụ ọtọ ~2 nanometer.
igbo.hexagonal_prisms_with_rhombic_bottoms_: Hexagonal prisms nwere ala rhombic. Aṅụ anaghị agbakọ ihe ọ bụla — biophysics na-ebelata oghere na-akpaghị aka.
igbo.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Tụba spaghetti na enweghị usoro — ọnụọgụgụ nkezi nke ọgafe = (L/πd) × π × n. Eji ya na-atụ atụ π n'ọgbakọ.
igbo.study_of_flags_comes_from_latin_vexill: Ọmụmụ ọkọlọtọ. Site na Latin vexillum (ọkọlọtọ ndị agha Rome bu).
igbo.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Mee ka ọ dị mfe (nwata nwere ike ịse site na ncheta), jiri akara nwere ihe ọ pụtara, agba isi 2–3, enweghị mkpụrụedemede ma ọ bụ akara, dịrị iche.
igbo.most_common_2_3_e_g_france_germany_us_: Kacha ahụ: 2:3 (dịka France, Germany). US 1:1.9. UK 1:2. Ụfọdụ pụrụ iche: Switzerland 1:1, Nepal abụghị rectangle.
igbo.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Akara agbakwunyere na ọkọlọtọ (kpakpando, obe, anụmanụ). Okwu heraldic na-akọwa ọnọdụ ha.
igbo.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Rectangle elu-ekpe (ihe dị ka 1/4 nke ọkọlọtọ). Kpakpando US nọ ebe ahụ. Australia, New Zealand na-ejikwa canton design.
igbo.hoist_side_attached_to_pole_fly_opposi: Akụkụ hoist = akụkụ jikọtara na osisi. Akụkụ fly = akụkụ megide (n'efu).
igbo.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Uhie = obi ike, mgbanwe, ọbara. Blue = oke osimiri, mbara igwe, nnwere onwe. Green = ala, okike, Islam. Ọcha = udo, ịdị ọcha. Odo/ọlaedo = akụ, anyanwụ.
igbo.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Ịfụ ọkọlọtọ n'isi ala (ebe enweghị symmetry); ọkapa osisi = iru uju.
igbo.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Blue dị mfe na maapụ (UN) ma ọ bụ kọmpass (NATO). Kpachaara anya zere akara mba/okpukpe.
igbo.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Ọkọlọtọ bụ geometry e depụtara. Ọkọlọtọ mba ọ bụla nwere nkọwapụta: ratio, koodu agba, ọnọdụ akara, akụkụ kpakpando.
igbo.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 pụtara X inch rise kwa inch 12 nke run kwụ ọtọ.
igbo.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. Akọwapụtara kpọmkwem. Ìhè na-agafe 1 AU n'ime ~8.3 nkeji.
igbo.9_461_10_m_distance_light_travels_in_1: 9.461×10¹⁵ m. Anya ìhè na-aga n'ime afọ 1 Julian.
igbo.3_26_light_years_distance_at_which_1_a: ~3.26 afọ ìhè. Anya nke 1 AU na-eme akụkụ arcsecond 1.
igbo.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 AU (2024). Ihe kacha ọsọ mmadụ mere na-ahapụ sistemụ anyanwụ. Ka na-eziga data.
igbo.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: H → He ~620 nde tọn kwa sekọnd. Na-efunahụ ~4 nde tọn dị ka ike (E = mc²).
igbo.stream_of_charged_particles_400_800_km: Iyi nke charged particles. ~400–800 km/sek nso ụwa. Na-akpata aurora + na-akpụ ọdụ comet.
igbo.notable_peaks_their_slopes: ⛰ Elu ugwu ndị mara ama + mkpọda ha
igbo.solar_system_planets_dwarf_planets: 🪐 Mbara ala + dwarf planet sistemụ anyanwụ
igbo.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Ndakpọ axial na-akwọ oge. Ndakpọ > 90° pụtara retrograde rotation (Venus, Uranus, Pluto).
igbo.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Ị nwere ike ịgafe akwa mmiri 7 nke Königsberg ọ bụla otu ugboro?
igbo.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: Mba. Euler gosipụtara (1736) node ọ bụla aghaghị inwe even degree, belụsọ ruo node 2 nke odd-degree. Königsberg nwere node 4 nke odd-degree. Nke a tọrọ ntọala graph theory.
igbo.using_only_compass_straightedge_constr: Site na kọmpass + straightedge naanị, wuo square nwere oghere hà na okirikiri e nyere.
igbo.impossible_is_transcendental_lindemann: Enweghị ike. π bụ transcendental (Lindemann 1882). Enweghị ike iwu ya na ọrụ kọmpass na straightedge nwere oke.
igbo.construct_a_cube_with_twice_the_volume: Jiri kọmpass + straightedge wuo cube nwere mkpọ okpukpu abụọ nke cube e nyere.
igbo.impossible_requires_2_which_is_algebra: Enweghị ike. Ọ chọrọ ∛2, nke bụ algebraic nke degree 3, ebe kọmpass na straightedge na-ewu ọnụọgụgụ degree 2ⁿ naanị.
igbo.divide_an_arbitrary_angle_into_3_equal: Kewaa akụkụ ọ bụla n'ụzọ atọ hà site na kọmpass + straightedge.
igbo.impossible_in_general_some_specific_an: Enweghị ike n'ozuzu. Ụfọdụ akụkụ pụrụ iche (dị ka 180°) enwere ike. Origami nwere ike ịkewa akụkụ ọ bụla ụzọ atọ.
igbo.given_two_circles_how_do_they_relate: Enyere okirikiri abụọ, kedu ka ha si emekọrịta?
igbo.5_cases_separate_externally_tangent_in: Okwu 5: kewaa, tangent na mpụga, gafee (isi 2), tangent na ime, otu n'ime nke ọzọ.
igbo.can_every_planar_map_be_colored_with_4: Enwere ike iji agba 4 tee maapụ planar ọ bụla ka mpaghara abụọ ọ bụ nso ghara ikere otu agba?
igbo.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Ee. Appel + Haken gosipụtara (1976) — usoro ukwu mbụ e ji kọmpụta gosipụta.
igbo.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Kedu ụzọ site na A ruo B (B dị ala) na-ebelata oge nke ihe na-amị ala site na gravity?
igbo.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloid. Bernoulli welitere (1696). Newton dozie n'otu abalị + 4 ndị ọzọ (gụnyere Leibniz).
igbo.cut_a_circular_pizza_into_8_sectors_wi: Bee pizza okirikiri n'ime sector 8 site na nbee na-agafe otu isi (ọ bụghị mgbe niile etiti). Iberibe na-agbanwe agbanwe nwere oghere hà.
igbo.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Eziokwu maka odd multiple ọ bụla nke sector 4. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ na 8, 12, 16…
igbo.for_what_radii_of_intersecting_circles: Maka kedu radii nke okirikiri na-agafe agafe ọdịdị ọnwa («lune») + lens ọ ga-enwe oghere hà?
igbo.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Ratio na-adabere — a dozie ya site na analysis. Geometry ịhụnanya site n'akwụkwọ 1942.
igbo.intersection_of_two_perpendicular_cyli: Ngafe nke cylinder abụọ perpendicular nke radius hà.
igbo.has_4_vertices_looks_like_a_4_faced_cu: Nwere vertices 4, dị ka ohiri isi ihu 4. Mkpọ = (16/3)r³.
igbo.drop_a_needle_of_length_l_onto_paralle: Tụba agịga nke ogologo L n'elu ahịrị dị n'otu ahịrị nke dị anya d. Gịnị bụ ohere agịga ga-agafe ahịrị?
igbo.2l_d_for_l_d_method_to_compute_by_drop: 2L/(πd) maka L ≤ d. Ụzọ ịgbakọ π site na ịtụba agịga!
igbo.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Ị nwere ike ịbee okirikiri n'ime iberibe, hazigharịa ka ọ bụrụ square nwere oghere hà?
igbo.yes_laczkovich_1990_with_10_pieces_cho: Ee (Laczkovich 1990) — na iberibe ~10⁵⁰. Ọ chọrọ axiom of choice. Ịbee ya na mma ozu enweghị ike; iberibe na-eju anya.
igbo.can_you_cut_a_ball_into_pieces_rearran: Ị nwere ike ịbee bọọlụ n'ime iberibe, hazigharịa ka ọ bụrụ bọọlụ abụọ nwere nha hà?
igbo.yes_requires_axiom_of_choice_non_measu: Ee — ọ chọrọ axiom of choice + iberibe enweghị ike ịtụ. Ọ na-emegide echiche mana ọ ziri ezi na mgbakọ.
igbo.why_do_soap_films_take_certain_shapes: Gịnị mere film ncha ji ewere ụfọdụ ọdịdị?
igbo.they_minimize_surface_area_catenoid_be: Ha na-ebelata oghere elu. Catenoid (n'etiti mgbaaka), Plateau border (njikọ). Ha na-enye geometry mara mma.
igbo.simplest_regular_tiling_schl_fli_symbo: Tiling oge niile kacha mfe. Akara Schläfli {4,4}.
igbo.3_hexagons_around_each_vertex_6_3_hone: Hexagon 3 gburugburu vertex ọ bụla. {6,3}. Honeycomb. Kacha mma.
igbo.octagons_squares_4_8_8_hispanic_coloni: Octagon + square (4.8.8). Ụkpụrụ tile ndị Hispanic colonial.
igbo.dodecagons_triangles_3_12_12_some_pave: Dodecagon + triangle (3.12.12). Ụfọdụ ala e ji akwa.
igbo.just_rhombi_can_be_combined_to_make_pe: Rhombi naanị. Enwere ike ijikọta iji mee Penrose tiling.
igbo.two_rhombi_fat_thin_aperiodic_never_re: Rhombi abụọ (buru ibu + gịrịgịrị). Enweghị oge — anaghị emegharị. Symmetry ugboro 5.
igbo.kite_dart_aperiodic_with_5_fold_symmet: Kite + dart. Enweghị oge na symmetry ugboro 5.
igbo.right_triangles_arranged_in_pinwheels_: Right triangle e hazin'ime pinwheels. Enweghị oge. Eji ya na tiles nke Federation Square (Melbourne).
igbo.single_polygon_that_tiles_aperiodicall: Otu polygon nke na-atịa na-enweghị oge. Nnukwu nchọpụta nso nso a nke Smith, Myers, Kaplan, Goodman-Strauss.
igbo.improvement_on_hat_uses_only_direct_no: Nkwalite na «okpu» — na-eji tiles kpọmkwem (enweghị reflection) naanị.
igbo.5_sided_tiles_found_in_cairo_street_pa: Tiles akụkụ 5. Achọtara na ụzọ Cairo. Tile ọ bụla nwere akụkụ 4 nke ~120° + otu akụkụ nke 90°.
igbo.use_2_vertex_types_14_distinct_ones_so: Na-eji ụdị vertex 2. Enwere 14 dị iche (ụfọdụ na-arụrịta ụka). Mgbagwoju anya karịa ụdị Archimedes.
igbo.divide_plane_into_cells_closest_to_eac: Kewaa plane n'ime cell kacha nso na «seed» point ọ bụla. Ọ na-apụta n'okike (ntụpọ agụ, ụfụfụ).
igbo.triangle_mesh_with_property_that_no_po: Triangle mesh nwere ihe onwunwe na ọ dịghị isi n'ime circumscribed circle nke triangle ọ bụla. Dual nke Voronoi diagram.
igbo.15_distinct_convex_pentagon_shapes_can: Ọdịdị convex pentagon 15 dị iche nwere ike ịtịa plane. Nke ikpeazụ achọpụtara 2015 (Mann, McLoud, Von Derau). Marjorie Rice, onye na-amaghị ihe, chọtara 4 na 1970.
igbo.heptagons_impossible_in_euclidean_tile: Heptagon (enweghị ike na Euclidean plane) na-atịa plane hyperbolic na 3 gburugburu vertex ọ bụla. Escher sere.
igbo.square_tiles_with_curves_or_diagonals_: Square tiles nwere curves ma ọ bụ diagonals. Ntụzịaka na enweghị usoro → ụkpụrụ dị ka maze.
igbo.famous_tilings_of_the_plane: ◇ Tiling ndị ama ama nke plane
igbo.latitude_longitude_in_decimal_degrees_: Latitude + longitude n'ogbe decimal. Latitude: 0° = equator, ±90° = pole. Longitude: 0° = Greenwich, ±180° = nso International Date Line.
igbo.famous_structures_their_angles: 🏛 Ihe owuwu ndị ama ama + akụkụ ha
igbo.at_each_vertex_you_need_3_polygons_who: Na vertex ọ bụla ị chọrọ polygon 3+ nke nchikota akụkụ < 360° (ma ọ bụghị larịị ma ọ bụ enweghị ike). Njikọ 5 naanị na-arụ ọrụ maka polygon oge niile.
igbo.v_e_f_2_holds_for_every_convex_polyhed: V − E + F = 2 eziokwu maka convex polyhedron ọ bụla (gụnyere Platonic solid 5 niile).
igbo.connecting_face_centers_of_a_platonic_: Ijikọ etiti ihu nke Platonic solid na-enye «dual» ya. Cube ↔ octahedron; dodecahedron ↔ icosahedron; tetrahedron ↔ onwe ya.
igbo.13_semi_regular_solids_same_arrangemen: Solid 13 kwụ ọtọ nso — otu nhazi na vertex ọ bụla, mana ọtụtụ ụdị polygon. Gụnyere truncated icosahedron (nhazi bọọlụ).
igbo.4_regular_star_polyhedra_with_pentagra: Star polyhedra 4 oge niile nwere pentagram faces ma ọ bụ vertices. Ọ bụghị convex.
igbo.start_with_triangle_on_each_side_repla: Malite na triangle. N'akụkụ ọ bụla, dochie etiti nke atọ na akụkụ abụọ nke obere triangle. Megharịa. Gburugburu enweghị njedebe, oghere nwere njedebe.
igbo.start_with_triangle_remove_middle_smal: Malite na triangle. Wepụ triangle etiti (obere). Megharịa na triangle ọ bụla fọdụrụ. Hausdorff dimension log(3)/log(2) ≈ 1.585.
igbo.remove_middle_third_of_segment_repeat_: Wepụ etiti nke atọ nke segment. Megharịa na segment ọ bụla fọdụrụ. Enweghị ngụ enweghị njedebe mana nchikota ogologo efu.
igbo.points_c_where_iterating_z_z_c_stays_b: Isi c ebe imegharị z = z² + c na-anọ bounded. Nkọwa enweghị njedebe na zoom ọ bụla. Achọpụtara 1980.
igbo.for_each_c_points_z_where_iterating_z_: Maka c ọ bụla, isi z ebe imegharị z = z² + c na-anọ bounded. c ọ bụla na-enye Julia set dị iche; ọnụ ha na-atịa Mandelbrot set.
igbo.fold_a_strip_of_paper_in_half_repeated: Pịaa strip akwụkwọ ọkapa ọ ọtụtụ ugboro; mepee mpịaji ọ bụla ruo 90°. Ma ọ bụ dochie segment kwụ ọtọ.
igbo.iterated_function_system_random_select: Iterated function system. Nhọrọ na enweghị usoro n'ime affine maps 4 na-emepụta ọdịdị akwụkwọ fern.
igbo.fractional_dimension_coastline_1_2_1_3: Fractional dimension. Ikpere osimiri ~1.2–1.3 dabere na ala. Ọ na-eweghara «ịdị mgbagwoju» karịa integer dimensions.
igbo.defining_property_strict_self_similari: Ihe onwunwe nkọwa. Self-similarity siri ike (Koch) ma ọ bụ statistical (ikpere osimiri).
igbo.coastlines_trees_lungs_bronchi_blood_v: Ikpere osimiri, osisi, ngụgụ (bronchi), akwara ọbara, netwọk osimiri, usoro ugwu, igwe ojii, àmụmà.
igbo.flat_plane_parallel_postulate_holds_an: Plane larịị. Parallel postulate na-arụ ọrụ. Akụkụ triangle na-agbakọ 180° kpọmkwem.
igbo.surface_of_sphere_triangle_angles_sum_: Elu sphere. Nchikota akụkụ triangle karịrị 180°. Mmụba hà na oghere. Eji ya na navigation.
igbo.saddle_shaped_surface_triangle_angles_: Elu nwere ọdịdị saddle. Nchikota akụkụ triangle dị ala karịa 180°. Ọtụtụ ahịrị dị n'otu ahịrị site na isi na-abụghị ahịrị.
igbo.shortest_paths_on_a_surface_straight_l: Ụzọ kacha mkpụmkpụ n'elu. Ahịrị kwụ ọtọ (Euclidean); great circles (sphere); hyperbolic lines (hyperbolic).
igbo.largest_circles_on_a_sphere_equator_me: Okirikiri kacha ukwuu na sphere. Equator + meridians. Ụgbọ elu na-agbaso ụzọ great circle.
igbo.euclidean_0_spherical_positive_hyperbo: Euclidean = 0. Spherical = positive. Hyperbolic = negative. Curvature na-akọwa geometry.
igbo.on_sphere_of_radius_r_triangle_area_r_: Na sphere nke radius R, oghere triangle = R² × (nchikota akụkụ − π).
igbo.positions_on_earth_s_surface_use_spher: Ọnọdụ n'elu ụwa na-eji spherical (ma ọ bụ ellipsoidal, ọ ka mma) geometry.
igbo.nyc_to_tokyo_is_shortest_via_the_arcti: New York ruo Tokyo kacha mkpụmkpụ site na Arctic, ọ bụghị ọwụwa anyanwụ kpọmkwem — nke a bụ great circle.
igbo.spacetime_is_curved_by_mass_energy_geo: A na-agba spacetime site na mass-energy. Geodesics bụ ụzọ ihe na-ada n'efu na-agbaso na spacetime gbagọrọ agbagọ.
igbo.a_vertical_or_angled_gnomon_casts_a_sh: «Gnomon» kwụ ọtọ ma ọ bụ nke akụkụ na-atụ ndò. Ka ụwa na-atụgharị, ndò na-agagharị n'akara.
igbo.for_accuracy_gnomon_must_be_parallel_t: Maka izi ezi, gnomon aghaghị ịdị n'otu ahịrị na axis ụwa — akụkụ site na larịị = latitude mpaghara.
igbo.dial_plate_perpendicular_to_gnomon_par: Dial plate perpendicular na gnomon (n'otu ahịrị na equator). Ahịrị awa nwere anya hà nke 15°.
igbo.dial_plate_parallel_to_ground_hour_lin: Dial plate n'otu ahịrị na ala. Ahịrị awa nwere anya na-adịghị hà — usoro: tan(akụkụ ahịrị awa) = sin(latitude) × tan(akụkụ awa).
igbo.dial_on_a_wall_hour_lines_depend_on_wa: Dial na mgbidi. Ahịrị awa dabere na ntụzịaka mgbidi + latitude.
igbo.sundial_time_differs_from_clock_time_b: Oge elekere anyanwụ dị iche na oge elekere ruo ~16 nkeji n'afọ. N'ihi elliptical orbit ụwa + axial tilt.
igbo.figure_8_trace_of_sun_s_position_at_sa: Akara ọdịdị-8 nke ọnọdụ anyanwụ n'otu oge elekere kwa ụbọchị n'afọ. A na-egosi na ụfọdụ elekere anyanwụ ukwu.
igbo.sundial_shows_local_apparent_solar_tim: Elekere anyanwụ na-egosi local apparent solar time. Ọ dị iche na civil time n'ihi ọdịiche longitude n'ime time zone + daylight saving.
igbo.very_precise_sundials_with_corrections: Elekere anyanwụ ziri ezi nke ọma na mgbazi nke equation of time + longitude. Ziri ezi ruo sekọnd.
igbo.phi_1_61803398874989_irrational_roots_: φ (phi) ≈ 1.61803398874989… irrational. Root nke x² = x + 1.
igbo.a_line_divided_so_that_whole_larger_la: Ahịrị e kewara ka ọ dị: mkpọkọta : buru ibu = buru ibu : obere. (a+b)/a = a/b = φ.
igbo.ratio_of_consecutive_fibonacci_numbers: Ratio nke ọnụọgụgụ Fibonacci na-esote na-abịaru φ nso: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 → 21/13 ≈ 1.615.
igbo.long_side_short_side_remove_a_square_r: Akụkụ ogologo / akụkụ mkpụmkpụ = φ. Wepụ square → rectangle fọdụrụ bụkwa golden.
igbo.logarithmic_spiral_with_growth_factor_: Logarithmic spiral nwere growth factor φ kwa okara ntụgharị. A na-abịaru ya nso na Fibonacci squares + arcs.
igbo.ratios_of_pentagram_diagonals_to_sides: Ratio nke diagonals pentagram na akụkụ = φ. Pythagoras maara nke a.
igbo.spiral_arrangements_in_sunflowers_pine: Na nhazi spiral na sunflower, pine cone, shei nautilus. Ọ na-egosi packing kacha mma maka growing meristems.
igbo.often_claimed_in_parthenon_mona_lisa_e: A na-ekwukarị na ọ dị na Parthenon, Mona Lisa, wdg — ọtụtụ nkwupụta enweghị ntọala. Ezi nka golden: ojiji kpachaara anya na narị afọ nke 20 (Le Corbusier, Dalí).
igbo.long_believed_humans_find_golden_ratio: A kweere ogologo oge na ụmụ mmadụ na-ahụ golden ratio ka ọ mara mma. Ihe akaebe siri ike dị ike karịa ka akụkọ ọha na-egosi.
igbo.1_1_1_1_1_1_most_irrational_number_slo: φ = 1 + 1/(1 + 1/(1 + 1/(…))). Ọnụọgụgụ «kacha irrational» — continued fraction kacha nwayọọ na-abịaru nso.
igbo.active_research_area_can_solve_cubic_e: Mpaghara nyocha na-arụ ọrụ. Nwere ike idozi cubic equations (enweghị ike na kọmpass + straightedge naanị). Jikọtara na algebra.
igbo.at_any_flat_foldable_vertex_mountain_f: Na vertex ọ bụla flat-foldable, |mountain folds − valley folds| = 2.
igbo.at_a_flat_foldable_vertex_alternating_: Na flat-foldable vertex, akụkụ na-agbanwe agbanwe gburugburu vertex na-agbakọ ruo 180°.
igbo.standard_paper_can_be_folded_in_half_7: Akwụkwọ nkịtị nwere ike ịpịa ya ọkapa ọ ugboro ~7. Mpịaji ọ bụla na-abawanye ọtụtụ. Mgbe 7 gasịrị, akwụkwọ dị oke. Rikọd (na ngwaọrụ pụrụ iche + akwụkwọ buru ibu nke ọma): mpịaji 12.
igbo.flat_sheet_can_fold_into_virtually_any: Akwụkwọ larịị nwere ike ịpịa ya n'ime ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ọdịdị 3D ọ bụla ma ọ bụrụ na e pịara nke ọma. Origami ọgbara ọhụrụ mgbagwoju anya nke ukwuu.
igbo.james_webb_space_telescope_sunshield_f: Sunshield nke James Webb Space Telescope ka a pịara maka mbupụ (ụkpụrụ origami), gbasaa na mbara igwe.
igbo.folded_efficiently_to_fit_in_compartme: A pịara nke ọma ka ọ baa n'ime akụkụ, na-agbasa ngwa ngwa.
igbo.origami_inspired_medical_stents_fold_t: Stents ọgwụ nke origami kpaliri na-apịa obere maka ntinye, na-agbasa n'ime artery.
igbo.parallelogram_based_fold_lets_large_su: Mpịaji dabere na parallelogram na-eme ka nnukwu elu (solar panel) gbasaa site na ngwugwu kpọmkwem na otu adọ.
igbo.cuts_allowed_in_addition_to_folds_used: A na-anabata nbee na mgbakwunye na mpịaji. Eji ya maka akwụkwọ pop-up + nhazi sayensị.
igbo.parallel_lines_converge_to_vanishing_p: Ahịrị dị n'otu ahịrị na-ezukọ na vanishing points. Isi 1 (na-ele ụzọ), isi 2 (nkuku ụlọ), isi 3 (na-ele ụlọ elu elu).
igbo.where_parallel_lines_appear_to_meet_on: Ebe ahịrị dị n'otu ahịrị na-egosi na ha na-ezukọ na horizon. A na-akọwa ya site na ọnọdụ onye na-ele + ntụzịaka ahịrị.
igbo.horizontal_line_at_viewer_s_eye_height: Ahịrị larịị na ịdị elu anya onye na-ele. Vanishing points niile nọ na ya (maka ahịrị dị n'otu ahịrị na ala).
igbo.objects_pointing_at_viewer_appear_comp: Ihe na-atụzị onye na-ele na-egosi mkpakọ. Ịse aka na-atụzị onye na-ele = ihe ịma aka.
igbo.divide_canvas_photo_into_9_equal_secti: Kewaa canvas/foto n'ime akụkụ 9 hà. Tinye isiokwu na njikọ maka nhazi na-emegharị.
igbo.camera_tilted_off_horizontal_creates_u: Igwefoto e wedara site na larịị na-emepụta enweghị udo, enweghị nkwụsi ike, mmegharị.
igbo.sun_angle_determines_shadow_length_dir: Akụkụ anyanwụ na-ekpebi ogologo + ntụzịaka ndò. Akụkụ dị ala (golden hour) = ndò ogologo + agba ọkụ.
igbo.brunelleschi_1413_demonstrated_mathema: Brunelleschi (~1413) gosipụtara mathematical linear perspective. Alberti hazie ya (1435).
igbo.distant_objects_appear_bluer_less_dist: Ihe dị anya na-egosi acha anụnụ anụnụ + enweghị ntụpọ n'ihi atmospheric scattering.
igbo.some_traditions_use_specific_angles_ra: Ụfọdụ ọdịnala na-eji akụkụ pụrụ iche + ratio (nhazi geometry Islam, mandala India, cathedral Gothic).
igbo.mathematical_artist_impossible_objects: Onye nka mgbakọ. Ihe enweghị ike (Penrose triangles), tessellation, hyperbolic geometry.
igbo.folding_angles_crease_patterns_produce: Akụkụ mpịaji + ụkpụrụ mpịaji na-emepụta ihe ọkpụkpụ 3D site na akwụkwọ larịị.
igbo.curves_formed_when_a_plane_intersects_: Curve e mepụtara mgbe plane gafere cone (nwere nap abụọ). Akụkụ plane megide axis cone na-akọwa ụdị curve.
igbo.the_only_5_convex_regular_polyhedra_al: 5 naanị nke convex regular polyhedra. Ihu niile bụ polygon oge niile hà, ọnụọgụgụ otu na-ezukọ na vertex ọ bụla.
igbo.shapes_that_exhibit_self_similarity_at: Ọdịdị na-egosi self-similarity na scale ọ bụla. Benoit Mandelbrot (1975) chepụtara okwu ahụ site na Latin fractus, «gbajiri».
igbo.geometries_on_curved_surfaces_euclid_s: Geometry n'elu gbagọrọ agbagọ. Parallel postulate Euclid anaghị arụ ọrụ. Achọpụtara na 1820 (Lobachevsky, Bolyai, Gauss).
igbo.projecting_curved_earth_onto_a_flat_ma: Ịtụpụ ụwa gbagọrọ agbagọ n'elu maapụ larịị mgbe niile na-emebi ihe ụfọdụ — akụkụ, oghere, anya, ma ọ bụ ọdịdị. A na-emezi projection ọ bụla maka ojiji dị iche.
igbo.many_popular_claims_about_the_golden_r: Ọtụtụ nkwupụta ama ama gbasara golden ratio na nka, ihe owuwu, na «ịma mma» enweghị ntọala ma ọ bụ agbakwunyere azụ. Ezi ihe onwunwe mgbakọ + mara mma; nkwupụta omenala na-abụkarị ọ bụghị.
igbo.origami_connects_geometry_to_engineeri: Origami na-ejikọ geometry na injinia, bayoloji, na nhazi. Ụkpụrụ mgbakọ na-akọwa mpịaji ndị enwere ike.
igbo.many_athletic_skills_depend_on_launch_: Ọtụtụ nkà egwuregwu dabere na launch angle. «45° kacha mma» ọdịnala bụ eziokwu naanị maka projectile a na-atụ + na-ada n'otu ịdị elu (enweghị air resistance).
